headline: Is Digital Realty Trust (DLR) Pricing In AI Data Center Hype Or Future Growth Potential
summary: Wondering if Digital Realty Trust at around US$184.93 is offering fair value or if the price is getting ahead of itself? This article focuses squarely on what that share price could mean for you as an investor. The stock is up 19.3% year to date and 94.3% over 3 years, even though it has fallen 1.2% over the last week and 5.3% over the past month. These moves can change how the market views both its potential and its risks. Recent news coverage has centered on data center operators like...
